name: 战术意识
subject: pe
domain_name: 策略与战术 / Tactics & Strategy / Tactics
curriculum_points: Demonstrate tactical awareness by selecting and applying appropriate strategies (e.g., width and depth in attack, delay in defense) to solve problems posed during game play, addressing Criterion C: Applying and Performing.

Evaluate the effectiveness of tactical decisions in a game situation, using terminology such as 'advantage' and 'transition' to analyze performance and propose improvements, linking to Criterion A: Knowing and Understanding.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 战役动态地图：标注行军路线+关键节点，点击节点查看战术说明
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 战役路线动态地图
